replies.msg:
1. Glass AKA Silicon Dioxide (mostly) is just more durable then most plastics. It is especially less affected by scratches, which guaranties that it stays nice and transparent for very long, whereas plastics are very subjected to scratching and will become milky and just not nice to look at or through relatively quickly (just try to use the same water bottle for a longer time, you’ll see it happen).
2. As stated in 1. glass is made up of silicon dioxide for the biggest part which can be extracted from sand. Plastics on the other hand are hydrocarbons, that are obtained from oil (Petroleum). Guess what there is plenty of on earth ? I’ll give you a hint.. it is NOT oil !

From: quora
https://www.quora.com/Why-arent-windows-made-from-plastic
